## Legend
- `BG` = blue_gem (regular)
- `GG` = green_gem (regular)
- `YG` = yellow_gem (regular)
- `PG` = purple_gem (regular)
- `RG` = red_gem (regular)
- `WI` = wineglass (regular)
- `RI` = ring (regular)
- `HO` = hourglass (regular)
- `CR` = crown (regular)
- `ZE` = zeus (scatter)
- `MU<n>` = multiplier (multiplier)
